---
title: "Page not found"
pagetitle: "404 — Page not found"
description-meta: "The page you are looking for does not exist on the NextGen Empirical Finance Research Camp site."
toc: false
number-sections: false
page-layout: article
---

::: {.not-found}

# 404

## This page is not here.

The link you followed is broken, the page has been moved, or the URL
was mistyped. None of those are research-ending events.

A few useful places to land instead:

- [**Home**](index.qmd) — the landing page with the 8-week arc.
- [**Preface**](book/00-front-matter/00-preface.md) — what this camp is and is not.
- [**How to use the book**](book/00-front-matter/02-how-to-use.md) — the recommended path.
- [**Instructor manual**](book/instructor-manual/README.md) — for course staff.
- [**Capstone gallery**](book/capstones/README.md) — five fully-specified research projects.
- [**Search**](#){.search-trigger onclick="document.querySelector('.aa-DetachedSearchButton')?.click(); return false;"} — type a chapter or topic into the search bar in the navbar.

If you arrived from an external link that you think should still work,
please [open an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/edwardlg/nextgen-empirical-finance-camp/issues/new).

:::
